# Apple design notes

Apple Inc. publishes design guidance for platforms such as iOS and macOS.

## Typography

The San Francisco font family and SF Pro text styles are used across Apple interface design. These typography details should support the Apple typography wiki.

## Company context

The same note may also mention the App Store, developer accounts, and iPhone platform strategy, which should support the Apple Inc. wiki instead of typography.
